1056.issue: [W1056] admin 7.6.17 listed as dependency but 7.6.20 is recommended. Please consider updating globalDependency at [io-package.json](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.tvprogram/blob/master/io-package.json).

5054.issue: [S5054] method "setObject()" should be avoided. Please use "setObjectNotExists()" or "extendObject()" instead.

8004.issue: [W8004] Please process PR [[#961] "[iobroker-bot] Add CHANGELOG_OLD.md to store older changelog entries"](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.tvprogram/issues/961)

8917.issue: [W8917] At least major versions of @types/node should not be updated by dependabot. Please add ignore block at dependabot.yml.

0028.issue: [W0028] Minimum node.js version 22 recommended. Please adapt "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '20' } }" to "{'engines' : { 'node' >= '22' } }" at [package.json](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.tvprogram/blob/master/package.json).

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^25.8.0" at [package.json](https://github.com/oweitman/ioBroker.tvprogram/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
